description: Style Note mother earth's focus on providing livelihoods for rural artisans resulted in this handmade kurta that fuses earthy goodness with a modern cut and silhouette. This piece epitomises how fashion, vintage styling and comfort unite to create the perfect Indian tunic. Those interested in colour blocking can wear this with bright contrasting capris or pants. Others who want to keep their look classic and chic can pair this with tonal leggings and embellished slippers. Product Details Blue printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has an asymmetric neckline, three fourth sleeves with contrast piping on the cuffs, contrast panelling on the chest and a vented hem Material and Care 100% cotton Hand wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent as colour may bleed Flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron Do not soak Certain fabrics will shrink Size and Fit Regular Fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 32") is wearing a size M
